data.title: JP Morgan predicts mixed Q4 steel earnings despite rally in HRC prices (+17%) and metal margins expanding over 20%. Mill utilization up by 160 basis points. Earnings season approaching with steel companies' results to be released soon. Mixed forward demand indicators as buyers adapt to trade uncertainty.
data.description: Earnings season is approaching for major North American steel companies, with expectations for their upcoming releases. Analyst Bill Peterson from JP Morgan highlights that Steel equities have shown strength, with a remarkable 17% increase in the past three months, surpassing the State Street SPDR S&P Metals & Mining ETF, which saw a 15% rise. This growth has been fueled by a supply-driven surge in Hot Rolled Coil (HRC) prices, climbing 17%, despite weak demand fundamentals. Notably, HRC metal margins have widened by more than 20% compared to pre-tariff levels. Following the tariffs, mill utilization has risen by around 160 basis points above usual standards, according to Peterson. Looking ahead, there are conflicting signals from forward demand indicators as smaller buyers navigate uncertainties in trade policy. For a more detailed report, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: Rubrik introduces Rubrik Security Cloud Sovereign, ensuring data control for global organizations. #Rubrik #security #cloud
data.description: Rubrik, known as the Security and AI Operations Company and listed on NYSE as RBRK, has revealed the launch of Rubrik Security Cloud Sovereign in Palo Alto, California. This significant release provides global organizations with vital data control, something imperative for national security and operational sustainability. The innovation represents a turning point for global security infrastructure. Through Rubrik Security Cloud Sovereign, customers are empowered to manage the location and access to their data according to specific regulations. This demonstrates Rubrik’s dedication to offering secure data solutions.

data.title: TSMC posts strong Q4 report with record high stock as advanced chips for AI data centers drive sales.
data.description: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSMC) is experiencing success due to robust sales of advanced chips for AI data centers, leading to a record high stock performance. The chipmaker's Q4 report has further fueled the hype surrounding the AI megatrend, showcasing their strong presence in the industry.

data.title: Trump hints Kevin Warsh might be next Fed chair, not Kevin Hassett. Gold, silver, bitcoin prices drop.
data.description: On Friday, President Trump hinted that Kevin Warsh is likely to be chosen as the next Federal Reserve chairman, over Kevin Hassett. Following this news, the prices of gold, silver, and bitcoin experienced a decline. This potential shift in leadership at the Federal Reserve may have contributed to the drop in these assets.

data.title: Vishay Intertechnology stock gets RS rating upgrade due to rising price performance.
data.description: Vishay Intertechnology has demonstrated an increase in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade indicates a positive trend in the stock's performance.

data.title: Clearway Energy Cl C receives RS Rating upgrade for strong price performance. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Clearway Energy's Class C stock has exhibited strong price performance leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The increase in the rating signifies the stock's outperformance compared to other equities. This development reflects growing investor interest and confidence in Clearway Energy, positioning it favorably in the market.

data.title: Chicago Auto Show to hold First Responders and Military Appreciation Day on Feb. 11, 2026, offering free admission.
data.description: On Wednesday, February 11, 2026, the Chicago Auto Show will recognize the contributions of first responders and military personnel by offering them free admission at McCormick Place. This special day is dedicated to showing appreciation for their service. The event will be held in Chicago, and attendees can enjoy the exhibits and activities at no cost. This initiative aims to thank those who serve and protect the community. The Chicago Auto Show organizers are grateful for the dedication of these individuals and look forward to welcoming them on this day.

data.title: Crypto prices 1/16: BTC near $98k; altcoins expect buy interest at support levels amid market rally pause.
data.description: The recent surge in the cryptocurrency market came to a halt as Bitcoin encountered resistance around the $98,000 mark. Despite this setback, analysis of technical charts indicates that traders are likely to purchase altcoins and Bitcoin at lower prices near key support levels.

data.title: BMZ, Novo Nordisk Foundation, Rockefeller Foundation, and WFP aim to feed 100M children by 2030 in Africa, Asia, and Latin America. US$80M secured for School Meals Accelerator.
data.description: Focusing on alleviating hunger and poverty while enhancing food and nutrition security in Africa, Asia, and Latin America, a program aims to maximize the impact of national school feeding initiatives. This effort has been kickstarted with a substantial funding of US$80 million contributed by the four founding partners, along with France and the Global Partnership for...

data.title: Russell 2000 hits 11th straight record high, outperforms S&P 500 for 11 days. U.S. economy grew at 5.3% in Q4. Tariff pressures low.
data.description: The Russell 2000 index achieved a record high for the eleventh consecutive session, outperforming the S&P 500 for 11 days – the longest streak since 2008. Investors, anticipating strong US economic growth, shifted towards small and mid-cap companies for potential earnings surprises. Industrial production increased by 0.4%, surpassing expectations; retail sales indicated resilient consumer spending, and initial jobless claims eased labor market concerns. Tariff pressures were contained, and the Atlanta Fed's GDPNow model predicted a 5.3% expansion in Q4. Large-cap indices remained flat while the Russell 2000 increased by 0.5% during midday trading. The focus shifted to electricity-related stocks, exemplifying the bullish market sentiment.

data.title: Bluerock Private Real Estate Fund (BPRE) to pay $0.1117 per share monthly distribution on January 30, 2026.
data.description: New York, January 16, 2026 - Bluerock Private Real Estate Fund (NYSE: BPRE) will be issuing its inaugural monthly distribution to shareholders following its recent listing on the NYSE. The distribution, scheduled for January 30, 2026, will amount to $0.1117 per share for investors who are recorded as shareholders as of January 16.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) SCF 7.0 improves grant system with AI screening, refs rewards for developers.
data.description: The latest iteration of the Stellar (XLM) Community Fund, Version 7.0, has been released. This update brings several notable features including AI-powered prescreening, verified referral incentives, and accelerated funding tracks specifically designed for Web3 developers within the network. This development aims to enhance the funding process and support developers more efficiently. These enhancements are expected to streamline the process for applicants, providing them with quicker responses and verified referral rewards. This initiative reflects the commitment to innovation and support for developers within the Stellar community, ensuring that they have the necessary resources to thrive.

data.title: VeChain VET, Rekord, and AMRC collaborate on EU Digital Product Passport system, handling over 100K events per month.
data.description: VeChain, Rekord, and Sheffield's AMRC have collaborated to introduce a production-scale DPP infrastructure in anticipation of EU mandates. The system is capable of handling over 100,000 events per month. For further details, click on the link provided.

data.title: Bitcoin drops but shows promising bullish signal; potential for recovery rally soon, as analysts expect. #BTC #cryptocurrency #signals
data.description: Today, the price of Bitcoin is facing a decline, yet on the positive side, BTC has recently displayed its most prominent bullish signal. This development has caught the attention of numerous investors and analysts, raising hopes of a potential recovery rally in the near future.
